description: CompositionBlue and navy blue striped polo T-shirt with green accents, made 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves and embroidered brand logo on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash and iron inside outMachine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft cotton fabric, this polo neck T-shirt from puma is designed to offer exemplary comfort, while the embroidered logo on the left chest oozes sporty attitude. Team it with jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
